# Basic Webserver with Database

Minimal web server templates that connect to a UIS-deployed database

| Template | Description | Install |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| [Python Basic Webserver with Database](python-basic-webserver-database) | Flask server that connects to PostgreSQL and reads from a tasks table | `dev-template python-basic-webserver-database` |
